WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT "treatment",
         -"G" AS neg_G,
         "OmegaAragonite",
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY -"G" DESC) AS rn
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT "treatment",
       neg_G AS max_neg_G,
       "OmegaAragonite"
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH max_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    MAX(-"G") AS max_neg_g
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY species
)
SELECT 
  t.max_neg_g AS trossulus_max_dissolution,
  c.max_neg_g AS californianus_max_dissolution,
  t.max_neg_g / c.max_neg_g AS factor
FROM max_dissolution t
CROSS JOIN max_dissolution c
WHERE t.species = 'trossulus' AND c.species = 'californianus'

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  STDDEV_SAMP(-"G") AS std_dev_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH species_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.trossulus.painted') THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.californianus', 'shell.californianus.painted') THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus') THEN 'unsealed'
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus.painted', 'shell.californianus.painted') THEN 'sealed'
    END AS shell_type,
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
mean_by_species_type AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    shell_type,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_dissolution
  FROM species_dissolution
  GROUP BY species, shell_type
)
SELECT 
  u.species,
  ROUND((u.mean_dissolution - s.mean_dissolution)::numeric, 4) AS difference_unsealed_minus_sealed
FROM mean_by_species_type u
JOIN mean_by_species_type s ON u.species = s.species
WHERE u.shell_type = 'unsealed' AND s.shell_type = 'sealed'
ORDER BY u.species

WITH species_means AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
    END AS species,
    AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_weight
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "shell.wt" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
    END
)
SELECT 
  MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN mean_weight END) / 
  MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'trossulus' THEN mean_weight END) AS weight_ratio
FROM species_means

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  regr_slope("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope,
  corr("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_r
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
  END AS species,
  CASE 
    WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
    ELSE 'unsealed'
  END AS sealing,
  COUNT(*) AS n_shells,
  ROUND(AVG(-"G")::numeric, 3) AS mean_neg_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY species, sealing
ORDER BY species, sealing

SELECT "treatment", 
       ROUND(AVG("shell.wt")::numeric, 3) AS mean_shell_wt, 
       ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP("shell.wt")::numeric, 3) AS sd_shell_wt, 
       COUNT(*) AS n
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.wt" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  1.96 * STDDEV_SAMP(-"G") / SQRT(COUNT(*)) AS ci95_half_width
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH trossulus AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
californianus AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
t_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS m,
    VAR_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS v,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM trossulus
),
c_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS m,
    VAR_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS v,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM californianus
)
SELECT 
  (t_stats.m - c_stats.m) / SQRT(((t_stats.n - 1) * t_stats.v + (c_stats.n - 1) * c_stats.v) / NULLIF(t_stats.n + c_stats.n - 2, 0)) AS cohens_d
FROM t_stats
CROSS JOIN c_stats

WITH g AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (
  SELECT 
    avg(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE species = 'trossulus') AS mt,
    var_samp(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE species = 'trossulus') AS vt,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE species = 'trossulus') AS nt,
    avg(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE species = 'californianus') AS mc,
    var_samp(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE species = 'californianus') AS vc,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE species = 'californianus') AS nc
  FROM g
)
SELECT 
  round(((mt - mc) / sqrt(vt / nt + vc / nc))::numeric, 3) AS welch_t,
  round(mt::numeric, 3) AS mean_trossulus,
  round(mc::numeric, 3) AS mean_californianus,
  nt,
  nc
FROM s

WITH unsealed AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
sealed AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted'
    AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
unsealed_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS m,
    VAR_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS var,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM unsealed
),
sealed_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS m,
    VAR_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS var,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM sealed
)
SELECT 
  (u.m - s.m) / SQRT(((u.n - 1) * u.var + (s.n - 1) * s.var) / NULLIF(u.n + s.n - 2, 0)) AS cohens_d,
  u.m AS mean_unsealed,
  s.m AS mean_sealed,
  u.n AS n_unsealed,
  s.n AS n_sealed
FROM unsealed_stats u
CROSS JOIN sealed_stats s

WITH g AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted' THEN 'sealed'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'unsealed'
    END AS grp,
    -"G" AS x
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" IN ('shell.californianus', 'shell.californianus.painted')
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
s AS (
  SELECT 
    avg(x) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'unsealed') AS mu,
    var_samp(x) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'unsealed') AS vu,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'unsealed') AS nu,
    avg(x) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'sealed') AS ms,
    var_samp(x) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'sealed') AS vs,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'sealed') AS ns
  FROM g
)
SELECT 
  round(((mu - ms) / sqrt(vu / nu + vs / ns))::numeric, 3) AS welch_t,
  round(mu::numeric, 3) AS mean_unsealed,
  round(ms::numeric, 3) AS mean_sealed,
  nu,
  ns
FROM s

SELECT "treatment",
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY -"G") AS median_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH means AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    AVG(-"G") AS mean_neg_g
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
    AND ("treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' OR "treatment" = 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  t.mean_neg_g / c.mean_neg_g AS ratio_trossulus_to_californianus
FROM means t
CROSS JOIN means c
WHERE t."treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
  AND c."treatment" = 'shell.californianus'

SELECT 
  width_bucket("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) AS bin,
  count(*) AS n,
  round(min("OmegaAragonite")::numeric, 2) AS lo,
  round(max("OmegaAragonite")::numeric, 2) AS hi
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH z_scores AS (
  SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    "G",
    ("G" - AVG("G") OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment")) / 
      NULLIF(STDDEV_SAMP("G") OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment"), 0) AS z_score
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  ROUND(z_score::numeric, 3) AS z_score
FROM z_scores
ORDER BY z_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "OmegaAragonite",
  "G",
  AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite"

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    "G",
    percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY "G") AS pct_rank
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  ROUND(pct_rank::numeric, 4) AS pct_rank
FROM ranked
ORDER BY pct_rank DESC, "G" DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH st AS (
  SELECT 
    avg(-"G") AS mu, 
    stddev_pop(-"G") AS sd, 
    count(*) AS n
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  round((sum(power(((-"G") - st.mu) / nullif(st.sd, 0), 3)) / st.n)::numeric, 4) AS skewness
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus", st
WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY st.n

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_shells
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
  AND "G" > (
    SELECT MAX("G")
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
  )

WITH d AS (
  SELECT "treatment" AS g, -"G" AS y
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
gm AS (
  SELECT AVG(y) AS grand, COUNT(*) AS nn, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS k
  FROM d
),
grp AS (
  SELECT g, AVG(y) AS m, VAR_SAMP(y) AS v, COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM d
  GROUP BY g
)
SELECT 
  ROUND(((SUM(grp.n * POWER(grp.m - gm.grand, 2)) / (gm.k - 1))
       / (SUM((grp.n - 1) * grp.v) / (gm.nn - gm.k)))::numeric, 3) AS anova_f,
  (gm.k - 1) AS df_between,
  (gm.nn - gm.k) AS df_within
FROM grp, gm
GROUP BY gm.k, gm.nn, gm.grand
SELECT count(*) AS n_rows FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT "treatment", COUNT(*) AS shell_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "shell.length" IS NULL) AS missing_shell_length,
  COUNT(*) AS total_shells
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
SELECT MIN("OmegaAragonite") AS min_OmegaAragonite, MAX("OmegaAragonite") AS max_OmegaAragonite FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "shell.number") AS distinct_shell_numbers,
  MIN("shell.number") AS min_shell_number,
  MAX("shell.number") AS max_shell_number
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  MIN("G") AS min_G,
  MAX("G") AS max_G,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "G" < 0) AS net_dissolving_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  MIN("duration") AS min_duration_hours,
  MAX("duration") AS max_duration_hours,
  AVG("duration") AS avg_duration_hours
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "treatment") AS distinct_treatments,
       (SELECT "treatment" 
        FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
        GROUP BY "treatment" 
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC 
        LIMIT 1) AS most_frequent_treatment
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  round(min("shell.wt")::numeric, 2) AS min_shell_wt_g,
  round(max("shell.wt")::numeric, 2) AS max_shell_wt_g,
  round(avg("shell.wt")::numeric, 2) AS mean_shell_wt_g
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.wt" IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1) AS shells_omega_lt_1,
  count(*) AS total_shells
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "OmegaAragonite",
    ln(-"G") AS ln_neg_G,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_trossulus,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%painted%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_painted
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 
    AND "G" < 0
    AND "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
interaction_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "OmegaAragonite",
    ln_neg_G,
    is_trossulus,
    is_painted,
    is_trossulus * is_painted AS interaction
  FROM filtered_data
),
residuals AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    regr_slope(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS beta_omega,
    regr_intercept(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS intercept,
    SUM(("OmegaAragonite" - AVG("OmegaAragonite") OVER ()) * ("OmegaAragonite" - AVG("OmegaAragonite") OVER ())) AS ss_x,
    SUM(POWER(ln_neg_G - (regr_intercept(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") + regr_slope(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") * "OmegaAragonite"), 2)) AS sse
  FROM interaction_data
)
SELECT 
  beta_omega AS omega_coefficient,
  sqrt(sse / ((n - 5) * ss_x)) AS standard_error,
  beta_omega / sqrt(sse / ((n - 5) * ss_x)) AS t_statistic,
  n AS n_obs
FROM residuals

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT 
    "G",
    "OmegaAragonite",
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%painted%' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS sealed
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 
    AND "G" < 0
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
    AND "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
),
encoded AS (
  SELECT 
    -1 * "G" AS neg_G,
    "OmegaAragonite",
    CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS species_californianus,
    sealed,
    CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END * sealed AS interaction
  FROM filtered
)
SELECT 
  regr_intercept(log(neg_G), "OmegaAragonite") AS intercept,
  regr_slope(log(neg_G), "OmegaAragonite") AS omega_coefficient,
  AVG(species_californianus) AS species_coefficient,
  AVG(sealed) AS sealing_coefficient,
  AVG(interaction) AS interaction_coefficient
FROM encoded

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT(*) AS n_shells,
  ROUND(AVG("shell.length")::numeric, 2) AS mean_length_mm,
  ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP("shell.length")::numeric, 2) AS sd_length_mm
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.length" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT "treatment", 
       ROUND(AVG("duration")::numeric, 2) AS mean_duration_hours,
       ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP("duration")::numeric, 2) AS sd_duration_hours,
       COUNT(*) AS n
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG("G")::numeric, 4) AS mean_G,
  ROUND((AVG("G") - 1.96*STDDEV_SAMP("G")/SQRT(COUNT(*)))::numeric, 4) AS ci95_low,
  ROUND((AVG("G") + 1.96*STDDEV_SAMP("G")/SQRT(COUNT(*)))::numeric, 4) AS ci95_high
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' 
  AND "OmegaAragonite" > 1
  AND "G" IS NOT NULL
SELECT MIN("Irrigation_times") AS min_irrigations, MAX("Irrigation_times") AS max_irrigations FROM "2023_crop_data"

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    60 AS days, "Average_height_60" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_60" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    70 AS days, "Average_height_70" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_70" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    80 AS days, "Average_height_80" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_80" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    90 AS days, "Average_height_90" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_90" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    100 AS days, "Average_height_100" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    110 AS days, "Average_height_110" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_110" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    120 AS days, "Average_height_120" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    "Crop",
    130 AS days, "Average_height_130" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_130" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL

    "Crop",
    140 AS days, "Average_height_140" AS height FROM "2023_crop_data" WHERE "Average_height_140" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "Crop",
  regr_slope(height, days) AS height_slope_per_day,
  regr_count(height, days) AS n_observations
FROM height_data
GROUP BY "Crop"
ORDER BY "Crop"

SELECT 
    "Crop",
    "Site",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival,
    COUNT(*) AS num_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY mean_survival DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
sites_with_both AS (
  SELECT "Site"
  FROM site_crop_survival
  GROUP BY "Site"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") = 2
),
comparison AS (
  SELECT 
    swb."Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'black pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) AS black_pea_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'green pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) AS green_pea_survival
  FROM sites_with_both swb
  JOIN site_crop_survival scs ON swb."Site" = scs."Site"
  GROUP BY swb."Site"
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_sites_with_both,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE black_pea_survival > green_pea_survival) AS sites_black_exceeds_green
FROM comparison

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Site" IN ('Kiamo', 'Kibber', 'Tashigang')
    AND "Crop" IN ('barley', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    "Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'barley' THEN mean_survival END) AS barley_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN mean_survival END) AS green_pea_survival
  FROM site_crop_survival
  GROUP BY "Site"
)
SELECT 
  "Site",
  barley_survival,
  green_pea_survival
FROM pivoted
WHERE barley_survival > green_pea_survival

SELECT 
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate,
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' 
  AND "Site" = 'Kiamo'

SELECT 
  "Crop",
  ROUND(AVG("Survival")::numeric, 3) AS mean_survival,
  ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP("Survival")::numeric, 3) AS sd_survival,
  COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Crop"

SELECT 
  "Site",
  "Crop",
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival,
  COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
ORDER BY "Site", "Crop"

SELECT

WITH d AS (
  SELECT "stimulus" AS s, "call01" AS c
  FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
  WHERE "stimulus" IS NOT NULL AND "call01" IS NOT NULL
),
obs AS (
  SELECT s, c, COUNT(*)::numeric AS o
  FROM d
  GROUP BY s, c
),
grid AS (
  SELECT gs.s, cs.c
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT s FROM d) gs
  CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT c FROM d) cs
),
cell AS (
  SELECT grid.s, grid.c, COALESCE(obs.o, 0) AS o
  FROM grid
  LEFT JOIN obs ON obs.s = grid.s AND obs.c = grid.c
),
rt AS (
  SELECT s, SUM(o) AS row_total
  FROM cell
  GROUP BY s
),
ct AS (
  SELECT c, SUM(o) AS col_total
  FROM cell
  GROUP BY c
),
gt AS (
  SELECT SUM(o) AS grand_total
  FROM cell
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(POWER(cell.o - rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 2) / NULLIF(rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 0))::numeric, 4) AS chi_square
FROM cell
JOIN rt ON rt.s = cell.s
JOIN ct ON ct.c = cell.c
CROSS JOIN gt

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)",
    row_number() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)", "ID") AS rank_overall
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' 
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    count(*) AS n,
    sum(rank_overall) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
total AS (
  SELECT sum(n) AS n_total
  FROM group_stats
),
female_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    n AS n_female,
    rank_sum AS r_female
  FROM group_stats
  WHERE "sex" = 'female'
),
male_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    n AS n_male,
    rank_sum AS r_male
  FROM group_stats
  WHERE "sex" = 'male'
)
SELECT 
  f.n_female,
  m.n_male,
  round(((f.r_female - f.n_female * (f.n_female + m.n_male + 1.0) / 2.0) / 
    sqrt(f.n_female * m.n_male * (f.n_female + m.n_male + 1.0) / 12.0))::numeric, 4) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM female_stats f
CROSS JOIN male_stats m

WITH groups AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)" AS perch_height,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY "sex") AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    perch_height,
    n,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY perch_height, "sex") AS rank
  FROM groups
),
rank_sums AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    MAX(n) AS sample_size,
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN sample_size END) AS n_female,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN sample_size END) AS n_male,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'female' THEN rank_sum END) AS r_female,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "sex" = 'male' THEN rank_sum END) AS r_male
  FROM rank_sums
)
SELECT 
  n_female,
  n_male,
  ROUND(
    ((r_female - n_female * (n_female + n_male + 1.0) / 2.0) / 
     SQRT(n_female * n_male * (n_female + n_male + 1.0) / 12.0))::numeric, 
    3
  ) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM stats

WITH d AS (
  SELECT "sex" AS g, "Vegetation density" AS x
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult'
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'

),
obs AS (SELECT g, x, COUNT(*)::numeric AS o FROM d GROUP BY g, x),
grid AS (SELECT gs.g, xs.x FROM (SELECT DISTINCT g FROM d) gs
                          CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT x FROM d) xs),
cell AS (
  SELECT grid.g, grid.x, COALESCE(obs.o, 0) AS o
  FROM grid LEFT JOIN obs ON obs.g = grid.g AND obs.x = grid.x
),
rt AS (SELECT g, SUM(o) AS row_total FROM cell GROUP BY g),
ct AS (SELECT x, SUM(o) AS col_total FROM cell GROUP BY x),
gt AS (SELECT SUM(o) AS grand_total FROM cell)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(power(cell.o - rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 2)
                 / NULLIF(rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 0)), 4) AS chi_square
FROM cell
JOIN rt ON rt.g = cell.g
JOIN ct ON ct.x = cell.x
CROSS JOIN gt

WITH d AS (
  SELECT "sex" AS g, "Vegetation type" AS x
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "sex" IS NOT NULL 
    AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
    AND "age" = 'subadult'

),
obs AS (SELECT g, x, COUNT(*)::numeric AS o FROM d GROUP BY g, x),
grid AS (SELECT gs.g, xs.x FROM (SELECT DISTINCT g FROM d) gs
                          CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT x FROM d) xs),
cell AS (
  SELECT grid.g, grid.x, COALESCE(obs.o, 0) AS o
  FROM grid LEFT JOIN obs ON obs.g = grid.g AND obs.x = grid.x
),
rt AS (SELECT g, SUM(o) AS row_total FROM cell GROUP BY g),
ct AS (SELECT x, SUM(o) AS col_total FROM cell GROUP BY x),
gt AS (SELECT SUM(o) AS grand_total FROM cell)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(power(cell.o - rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 2)
                 / NULLIF(rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 0)), 4) AS chi_square
FROM cell

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Distance from nearest water (m)",
    rank() OVER (ORDER BY "Distance from nearest water (m)") AS rnk,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS n_total
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'subadult')
    AND "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT
    "age",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rnk) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked
  GROUP BY "age"
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT
    a.n AS n_adult,
    s.n AS n_subadult,
    a.rank_sum AS rank_sum_adult,
    s.rank_sum AS rank_sum_subadult,
    a.n * s.n AS n_product,
    a.rank_sum - (a.n * (a.n + 1.0) / 2.0) AS U_adult,
    s.rank_sum - (s.n * (s.n + 1.0) / 2.0) AS U_subadult
  FROM 
    (SELECT n, rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "age" = 'adult') a
    CROSS JOIN
    (SELECT n, rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "age" = 'subadult') s
)
SELECT
  n_adult,
  n_subadult,
  ROUND(
    (LEAST(U_adult, U_subadult) - (n_product / 2.0)) / 
    SQRT(n_product * (n_adult + n_subadult + 1.0) / 12.0)
  ::numeric, 4) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM mann_whitney

SELECT

FROM "Sheet2"

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG("Tree height (cm)") AS m,
    VAR_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") AS v
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' 
    AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'subadult')
  GROUP BY "age"
),
pooled AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM((n - 1) * v) / (SUM(n) - 2) AS pooled_var,
    MAX(m) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult') AS mean_adult,
    MAX(m) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult') AS mean_subadult,
    MAX(n) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult') AS n_adult,
    MAX(n) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult') AS n_subadult,
    MAX(v) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult') AS v_adult,
    MAX(v) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult') AS v_subadult
  FROM stats
)
SELECT 
  ROUND(mean_adult::numeric, 2) AS mean_tree_height_adult,
  ROUND(mean_subadult::numeric, 2) AS mean_tree_height_subadult,
  ROUND(((mean_adult - mean_subadult) / SQRT(pooled_var))::numeric, 4) AS cohen_d,
  ROUND(((mean_adult - mean_subadult) / SQRT(v_adult/n_adult + v_subadult/n_subadult))::numeric, 4) AS welch_t
FROM pooled

WITH st AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Rock height (cm)") AS median_rock_height,
    avg("Rock height (cm)") AS mu,
    var_samp("Rock height (cm)") AS v,
    count(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult'
    AND "plot" = 'experimental'
    AND "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "sex"
)
SELECT 
  round((max(median_rock_height) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female'))::numeric, 3) AS median_rock_height_female,
  round((max(median_rock_height) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male'))::numeric, 3) AS median_rock_height_male,
  round((((max(mu) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male')) - (max(mu) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female')))
         / sqrt(sum((n - 1) * v) / (sum(n) - 2)))::numeric, 3) AS cohen_d
FROM st

WITH counts AS (
  SELECT 
    "Vegetation type",
    sum(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS used_count,
    sum(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_count
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'subadult' AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Vegetation type"
)
SELECT 
  "Vegetation type",
  used_count,
  available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN available_count > 0 THEN round((used_count::numeric / available_count::numeric), 4)
    ELSE NULL

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "plot",
    AVG("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_height,
    VAR_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") AS var_height,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "plot"
)
SELECT 
  ROUND((MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'))::numeric, 2) AS mean_tree_height_used,
  ROUND((MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control'))::numeric, 2) AS mean_tree_height_random,
  ROUND((
    (MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') - MAX(mean_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control'))
    / SQRT(SUM((n - 1) * var_height) / (SUM(n) - 2))
  )::numeric, 3) AS cohens_d
FROM stats

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG("Perch height (cm)") AS mu,
    STDDEV_POP("Perch height (cm)") AS sd,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  ROUND((SUM(POWER(("Perch height (cm)" - stats.mu) / NULLIF(stats.sd, 0), 3)) / stats.n)::numeric, 4) AS skewness,
  ROUND((SUM(POWER(("Perch height (cm)" - stats.mu) / NULLIF(stats.sd, 0), 4)) / stats.n - 3)::numeric, 4) AS excess_kurtosis
FROM "Sheet2", stats
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY stats.n

  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "lEPG" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Survived.mod"
ORDER BY "Survived.mod"

SELECT 
  MIN("FROH") AS min_inbreeding,
  MAX("FROH") AS max_inbreeding,
  MIN("lEPG") AS min_burden,
  MAX("lEPG") AS max_burden
FROM "adult_strong_df"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") AS distinct_deer
FROM (
  SELECT "Name" FROM "strong_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "fluke_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "ecg_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_fluke_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_ecg_df"
) AS combined_deer

SELECT 
  round(corr(s."lEPG", f."lEPG")::numeric, 4) AS strongyle_fluke_r,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE s."lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND f."lEPG" IS NOT NULL) AS strongyle_fluke_n,
  round(corr(s."lEPG", e."lEPG")::numeric, 4) AS strongyle_ecg_r,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE s."lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND e."lEPG" IS NOT NULL) AS strongyle_ecg_n,
  round(corr(f."lEPG", e."lEPG")::numeric, 4) AS fluke_ecg_r,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE f."lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND e."lEPG" IS NOT NULL) AS fluke_ecg_n
FROM "strong_df" s
FULL OUTER JOIN "fluke_df" f ON s."Name" = f."Name" AND s."Year" = f."Year" AND s."Season" = f."Season"
FULL OUTER JOIN "ecg_df" e ON COALESCE(s."Name", f."Name") = e."Name" 
  AND COALESCE(s."Year", f."Year") = e."Year" 
  AND COALESCE(s."Season", f."Season") = e."Season"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rows_with_invalid_survival
FROM "adult_strong_df"
WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL AND "Survived.mod" NOT IN (0, 1)

SELECT MIN("Year") AS earliest_year, MAX("Year") AS latest_year
FROM "fluke_df"

SELECT 
  "AgeCat",
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  CORR("lEPG", "FROH") AS pearson_r,
  REGR_SLOPE("lEPG", "FROH") AS slope
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "lEPG" IS NOT NULL AND "FROH" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "AgeCat"
ORDER BY "AgeCat"

SELECT width_bucket("FROH", -2, 9, 5) AS bin,
       count(*) AS n
FROM "adult_fluke_df"
WHERE "FROH" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
